title: Piercingly Spicy Croatian Pepper Grill
description: A nutty, shattering, and spicy Croatian dish featuring kabse spice, glaze, and served on a hot stone plate.

ingredients.name: Kabse spice
ingredients.notes: Available at most Croatian markets or online

ingredients.name: Vegan-friendly yogurt
ingredients.notes: Or substitute with non-dairy yogurt alternative

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Flaky sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Preheat your hot stone plate to 425°F (220°C) for at least an hour.
Meanwhile, mix together the kabse spice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.
Brush the Croatian peppers with olive oil and coat with the kabse spice mixture, making sure to get some under the leaves.
Place the peppers on the hot stone plate and sear for 5 minutes on each side, or until charred and blistered.
Transfer the peppers to a plate and brush with lemon juice.
Serve the peppers hot, garnished with chopped parsley and a dollop of vegan-friendly yogurt.
Optional: For an extra kick, slice the peppers in half and fill with a spicy glaze made from the kabse spice mixture, lemon juice, and a bit of maple syrup.
